# SL-HEAD-004: skipped-heading-level

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Heading hierarchy skips an intermediate level.

## Metadata

- Category: Headings and structure (headings-structure)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: heuristic
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- heading-sequence

## When This Triggers

Build rendered heading sequence and detect level jumps greater than one.

## False Positives

This rule is heuristic. Treat the diagnostic as a review prompt and use DSL
severity overrides or suppressions when project policy intentionally differs.

## How To Fix

Review heading hierarchy and avoid skipped levels where route policy requires
structure.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/headings/skipped-level

Fixed direction:

- Review heading hierarchy and avoid skipped levels where route policy requires
  structure.
